name: Cattle Call
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>烏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>う</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>象</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Send 1 face-up monster you control to the GY, whose original Type is Beast, Beast-Warrior, or Winged Beast; Special Summon 1 monster from your Extra Deck with the same original Type, but it cannot attack, its effects are negated, also it is destroyed during the End Phase. You can only activate 1 "Cattle Call" per turn.
eff: Send 1 face-up monster you control to the GY, whose original Type is Beast, Beast-Warrior, or Winged Beast; Special Summon 1 monster from your Extra Deck with the same original Type, but it cannot attack, its effects are negated, also it is destroyed during the End Phase. You can only activate 1 "Cattle Call" per turn.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
